heading: Omitted
label: 172, 173 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 172 and 173, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 172, , , authorized appointment of school employees as special peace officers.act Mar. 3, 1909, ch. 26635 Stat. 837Section 173, , , authorized establishment of a system of vocational training for aboriginal natives.act Feb. 25, 1925, ch. 320, § 143 Stat. 978
